overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character crossing a wet urban intersection at night during a storm, then walking and running along the Sunset Plaza sidewalk. The scene features neon-lit commercial buildings, reflective wet pavement, and dramatic lightning flashes against a dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet urban intersection crosswalk at night

events.description: black sedan with headlights on drives through the intersection from left to right
lightning flash illuminates the stormy night sky above the downtown skyline

agents.ego_description: walking across the zebra crosswalk from left to right, heading toward the Sunset Plaza sidewalk while rain falls

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with illuminated 'SUNSET PLAZA' signage and large windows
tall illuminated billboard featuring advertisement with multiple figures
cluster of illuminated modern skyscrapers against the dark stormy sky
zebra crossing with highly reflective wet asphalt surface mirroring city lights
yellow fire hydrant at the street corner

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a rain-slicked intersection at night, with the Sunset Plaza building and a large billboard visible ahead. A black sedan passes through the intersection as lightning flashes across the stormy sky above the distant downtown skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk along Sunset Plaza with tree lining

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet concrete sidewalk past the Sunset Plaza storefront and illuminated signs

entered.detail: row of leafy green trees lining the edge of the sidewalk
wet concrete pavement reflecting street lights and neon signs
green hedge running along the front of the plaza building
bright pink neon sign visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: Having reached the sidewalk, the character walks past the Sunset Plaza building now on the left, with trees lining the right side of the path. The wet concrete reflects the surrounding neon lights as the character moves deeper into the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined commercial sidewalk continuing into the distance

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: running along the sidewalk away from the plaza, moving quickly down the tree-lined street

entered.detail: vehicle headlights visible in the far distance down the street

segments.scene_description: The character breaks into a run along the continuing sidewalk, moving away from the Sunset Plaza. The large billboard recedes into the distance on the left while the tree line extends further down the wet pavement, with distant traffic lights visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked urban intersection into a neon-lit commercial district during a midnight storm. It begins with the character crossing the wet pavement toward the Sunset Plaza building and a large billboard, as a black sedan passes by and lightning flashes across the distant downtown skyline. As the character reaches the sidewalk, the perspective shifts to follow them past the plaza building on the left and a line of trees on the right, with the wet concrete reflecting the surrounding city lights. The scene then accelerates as the character breaks into a run, causing the billboard to recede into the distance while the tree line extends further down the path. Finally, the camera tracks the character moving deeper into the district toward distant traffic lights under the dark, stormy sky.
